mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, real_name, mobile, email, dept_id, status FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.real_name, u.mobile, u.email, u.dept_id, u.status, u.create_time, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(r.code) FROM sys_user_role ur INNER JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = u.id AND r.status = 1) as roles FROM sys_user u WHERE u.deleted = 0
AND u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')
AND u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{realName}, '%')
ORDER BY u.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE deleted = 0
AND username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')
AND real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{realName}, '%')
